title.en: Divine Blade Alliance, Tianlan Giant City Branch.

content.en:
Divine Blade Alliance, Tianlan Giant City Branch.

Ye Tian is here!

The Divine Blade Alliance has branches in all major star fields of the human race, and only a few weak star fields do not have branches of the Divine Blade Alliance.

And the Sanctuary has the most branches, and basically the important giant cities and continents have branches of the Divine Blade Alliance.

Ye Tian is just a member of the Divine Blade Alliance, and he can register in any branch, so there is no need to go to the headquarters of the Divine Blade Alliance to register.

When Ye Tian came to the branch of the Divine Blade Alliance in Tianlan Giant City, he immediately attracted the attention of many people.

"It's His Highness Wanfa!"

Someone exclaimed.

But soon, some people noticed that Ye Tian's cultivation had broken through to the galaxy level, and it was not appropriate to call His Highness Wanfa.

Therefore, someone came over to greet him: "I have seen the true monarch of ten thousand laws!"

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

......

For the politeness of others, Ye Tian nodded slightly, there was no need to respond deliberately.

It's not impolite, it's because of status, if any weak person needs to respond to greetings, wouldn't it be annoying to go out in the future, after all, there are too many people to greet him.

Then, Ye Tian came to a counter.

"I want to register as a member of the Divine Blade Alliance!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Wanfa Zhenjun, please wait!"

Counter service staff, Dao.

Immediately, the counter service staff handled the registration procedures for Ye Tian, and after a series of procedures, Ye Tian successfully became an ordinary member of the Divine Blade Alliance.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's membership token to be manufactured.

Moreover, a newcomer guide book about the rules of the Divine Blade Alliance was also given to Ye Tian.

In the next few days, Ye Tian focused on learning about the situation of the Divine Blade Alliance.

Soon, Ye Tian knew a lot about the Divine Blade Alliance, and gradually learned the general operation method of the Divine Blade Alliance.

The Divine Blade Alliance is similar to the ordinary Mercenary Chamber of Commerce and the Scattered Cultivation Alliance, but it is a little different.

That is, the Divine Blade Alliance can't form a team force!

Some mercenary organizations on the earth can basically form teams, and they will form groups or mercenary teams.

If you allow a mercenary team, it will be much easier to do the task, but there are also many problems.

For example, the larger the number of people in a team, if they are divided into levels, it is easy to form a group of forces and divide the Divine Blade Alliance.

As one of the supreme-level forces, the Divine Blade Alliance is absolutely not allowed to do this, even if those members are peripheral personnel, it is absolutely not allowed, otherwise the foundation of the Divine Blade Alliance will be damaged.

Therefore, there are no groups in the Divine Blade Alliance, only the official organization of the Divine Blade Alliance.

Become a member of the Divine Blade Alliance, you can buy items consigned by other members in the mall, which are basically genuine, because the insiders of the Divine Blade Alliance will detect it, and once you dare to sell it, you will be sanctioned by the Divine Blade Alliance, and in serious cases, you will even be imprisoned or even executed.

Therefore, few people dare to risk offending the Divine Blade Alliance to sell fakes.

In addition, members of the Divine Blade Alliance can receive quests and post quests to earn some resources.

And the biggest advantage of becoming a Divine Blade Alliance is that you have the opportunity to obtain the opportunity given by the Divine Blade Alliance, as well as the latest information.

If there is no Divine Blade Alliance, even if there is an opportunity somewhere, you will not be able to know the situation, which will lead to the loss of this opportunity.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the virtual network that entered the Divine Blade Alliance, and entered the virtual network to find out if there was any good task.

Although he has a lot of money, some resources are not something that money and treasures can exchange.

For example, some treasures that can allow Ye Tian to assist in creating a supreme sword path mastery, that is, no matter how many divine crystals there are, they can't buy them.

The quests of the Blade Alliance tend to attract people to take on the quest with extremely rare treasures, and once the quest is completed, the treasure can be obtained.

Ye Tian slowly looked at the questions that were released, but kept shaking his head.

There are restrictions on the Divine Blade Alliance's docking tasks, and the galaxy level can only receive galaxy-level tasks, but you can't receive the tasks of the cosmic god level.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only view it in the galaxy-level task section.

But the remuneration for the tasks here is very ordinary, and many tasks are not difficult for Ye Tian, but the remuneration makes him not have the slightest interest in taking on the tasks.

With his current value, even if it was the reward of an origin artifact, he didn't have the slightest interest.

After looking through the galaxy-level task section for a long time, there was finally a task that attracted Ye Tian's attention.

Tracking the peak powerhouse of the galaxy level - Yandao Allah (most likely to break through to the cosmic god realm), mission requirements: Find Yandao Allah and notify the official of the Divine Blade Alliance. Reward: Three Swords of Heavenly Dao Text!

"It turned out to be the Heavenly Dao text of the Three Swords!"

Ye Tian was very moved by such a reward.

It can even be said that any galaxy level will be moved, and even the cosmic gods will be moved!

The Heavenly Dao text is already very rare, and the Heavenly Dao text of the Sword is one of the more scarce ones, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race may have stock, but it will not be easily taken out and given to Ye Tian as a reward.

And this time, he took out three Heavenly Dao words at once, which shows how rich the reward for this task is.

"Although I once obtained a Sword Heavenly Dao Text, but I have already consumed it, if I obtain these three Sword Heavenly Dao Words, it will be of great help to my comprehension and creation of the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless Learning!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he also knew very well that since the Divine Blade Alliance had come up with such a reward, it could be seen that the task was very difficult.

The mission requires that you don't need to kill Allah of the Yan Dao, after all, it is only a task issued for the galaxy level, and the galaxy level wants to kill Allah of the Yan Dao, and it is too difficult.

Moreover, the mission content also mentioned that the Yandao Allah may have broken through to the cosmic god, and the galaxy level has almost no hope of killing the Yandao Allah.

Therefore, the mission requirements only need to find Allah of the Flame Knife and notify the headquarters of the Divine Blade Alliance.

Once the Divine Blade Alliance finds this Yan Dao Allah, it will naturally send a strong person to arrive as soon as possible, and it will not be difficult to kill Yan Dao Allah.

But even so, the task is very difficult, and once discovered, it is very dangerous for others, almost a certain death.

Ye Tian is not afraid of Allah of the Yan Dao, the reason why he is really interested in this task is not only the reward, but also one aspect, that is, the Allah of the Yan Dao has hid in the pan.

The pan domain is Ye Tian's hometown, and it is also a star field that Ye Tian is very familiar with.

Besides, he hadn't been to the Disk in a long time, so he wanted to go back and see his old friends by the way.

"This task, take it!"

Ye Tian immediately began to apply for this task.

Soon, the Blade Alliance agreed to the mission, and sent out detailed information about the mission.
